title: candidate-manifest
description: Machine truth for one GEPA candidate: its lineage, the single component it mutates, the files its diff touches, and the hash of that diff. tools/check-campaign.py gates it against the campaign manifest — a candidate that touches an undeclared or immutable file, drifts the diff hash, changes the budget, or omits its evidence bundle BLOCKS. A no-op baseline (is_baseline=true, no touched files) is a retained control, not a failure.

campaign_id.description: must match the owning campaign manifest

parent.description: lineage: the incumbent candidate id, or 'baseline'

track.description: must name a track declared in the campaign

mutation_target.description: the single declared component this candidate changes; every touched file must fall under it

touched_files.description: files changed by the diff; empty only for a baseline. All must be under mutation_target and none under an immutable prefix.

candidate_hash.description: hex sha256 of the diff file; mismatch blocks (tamper detection)

evidence_bundle.description: path to evidence-bundle.md; must exist on disk

is_baseline.description: true for the no-op control candidate

budget.description: optional; if present MUST equal the campaign budgets. A candidate cannot quietly buy itself more budget.
